---
title: "3 · Physics — Part 1: Hydrology"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Scope.** The water physics the twin constrains: how groundwater level and soil moisture are modelled
(physical / statistical / data-driven), and our ground — the closed pixel-wise **water budget**
(recharge, capillary rise, ET, saturation-excess runoff, TOPMODEL lateral flow) with its governing
equations.
:::

*Content migrating from "Hydrological modeling grounds", the water-budget equations, "PNW
Hydroclimatic Signals", the GWL stage pipeline, and the soil-moisture envelope/bucket.*

## How GWL and soil moisture are modelled (three paradigms)

## The constrained water budget (governing equations)

## The groundwater-level pipeline

## The soil-moisture envelope and bucket
